name: open-shortlink
description: Open-source URL shortener on Cloudflare Workers, with REST API and Remote MCP server.

API_TOKEN.description: **Required.** Bearer token for the REST API and MCP server. Must be **24+ random characters** — e.g. run `openssl rand -base64 32` and paste the result. Placeholders like `dev-token-change-me` are rejected at runtime. See the [security policy](https://tied-inc.github.io/open-shortlink/guide/security) for rotation and Cloudflare Access guidance.

CORS_ALLOW_ORIGIN.description: Optional. Comma-separated origin allowlist for CORS (e.g. `https://ui.example.com`). Leave empty or `*` to allow any origin — safe because the API is bearer-auth only.

PUBLIC_BASE_URL.description: Optional. Canonical origin returned in `shortUrl` responses. Set this once you bind a custom domain (e.g. `https://go.example.com`).
